name: The Three Holy Hierarchs
description: Sts. Basil the Great, Gregory the Theologian, and John Chrysostom — the three great hierarchs and ecumenical teachers, each individually venerated yet jointly commemorated.

name: The Seventy Apostles
description: The Seventy whom Christ sent out two by two (Luke 10), commemorated together as a synaxis alongside their individual feasts.

name: Synaxis of the New Martyrs and Confessors of Russia
description: Those who suffered for Christ during the Soviet-era persecutions of the twentieth century, commemorated together as a synaxis.
